user.title: Fröling Heater Connection
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of your TCP-to-serial converter connected to the heater's COM1 port.

sensors.title: Select Sensors
sensors.description: The heater was contacted and reported the sensors below with their current values. Select the sensors you want to monitor. Unselected sensors will not be polled, reducing serial traffic.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Fröling Heater
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for your TCP-to-serial converter.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the heater. Check host, port, and cable.
error.no_sensors: Connected successfully but no sensors were found.

init.title: Fröling Heater Options
init.description: Adjust polling interval and sensor selection. Sensor discovery requires a brief connection to the heater.
